title: Am I the only one who thinks that Ritsuko looks better without the lipstick
display_title: Am I the only one who thinks that Ritsuko looks better without the lipstick
wikitext:
[]: Am I the only one who thinks that Ritsuko looks better without the lipstick?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Thu Apr 20, 2023 11:40 pm There’s only been a few scenes in the series where she doesn’t have on her red lipstick. I think that it makes her look a bit younger, and she honestly looks better without it. I dunno, I just prefer the women with the natural, plain lips.

[]: Re: Am I the only one who thinks that Ritsuko looks better without the lipstick?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Apr 27, 2023 7:21 am I don't have an opinion about the lipstick, but I do think she would be a lot more appealing if she didn't smoke.
